channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Denver Broncos at New Orleans Saints: TV channel, time, what to know
item.description: The Denver Broncos face the New Orleans Saints on the road for Thursday Night Football; an anticipated match against coach Sean Payton's former team.
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Donnell, ABC 4

item.title: Trump says Josh Allen was going to be No 1 pick in 2018 NFL Draft before social media posts surfaced
item.description: Former President Donald Trump said Josh Allen would have been the No. 1 overall pick in the 2018 NFL Draft if it were for offensive comments that surfaced.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees beat Guardians 6-3 for 2-0 ALCS lead
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Aaron Judge sent the ball soaring toward Monument Park and Gleyber Torres tagged up at first base. “That was disrespect out of Gleyber, man,” Judge said with a smile. “He’s seen me hit 58 of those things this year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports NFL power rankings after Week 6 of 2024 NFL season
item.description: The Detroit Lions, Baltimore Ravens and Houston Texans emerged as possible contenders for the top of the NFL power rankings after Week 6.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ravens' dynamic duo of Henry and Jackson help lead a rushing renaissance in the NFL
item.description: The NFL's running game has had a bit of a renaissance early this season thanks in part to a dynamic duo in Baltimore off to a historic start.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Alex Cobb was dropped from Cleveland's American League Championship Series roster on Tuesday after he got hurt yet again in the opener, leaving the Guardians in search of a Game 5 starter against the New York Yankees. “It’s been a challenging year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Aaron Judge snaps postseason slump, Yankees take 2-0 lead over Guardians in ALCS
item.description: Aaron Judge finally hit a home run, and the New York Yankees bullpen remained dominant in their win on Tuesday to take a 2-0 lead in the ALCS.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: For Johnny and Matthew: Blue Jackets play their home opener with Gaudreaus in mind
item.description: Johnny Gaudreau’s Columbus teammates were given a few options for how to handle their emotions during the Blue Jackets’ home opener. If you want to cry, cry. If you want to laugh, laugh. The only rules — play the game the way “Johnny Hockey” would and with him in mind.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Breanna Stewart and her wife Marta Xargay receive homophobic threats after Game 1 of WNBA Finals
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — New York Liberty star Breanna Stewart and her wife Marta Xargay received threatening homophobic anonymous emails after Game 1 of the WNBA Finals. The emails went directly to Xargay's account, which was a bit unnerving for the couple, Stewart said at practice on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tom Brady's purchase of a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders is approved by NFL team owners
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Tom Brady has another new role in the NFL: owner. The seven-time Super Bowl champion purchased a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders, a deal unanimously approved by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: NFL owners approve Jacksonville's $1.4 billion 'stadium of the future' set to open in 2028
item.description: NFL owners unanimously approved Jacksonville's $1.4 billion “stadium of the future” Tuesday, a decision that should keep the Jaguars in one of the league's smallest markets for at least another 30 years.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears vs Commanders flexed to later time slot: NFL
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears Week 8 game at the Washington Commanders has been flexed to the late afternoon window, according to a press release from the NFL League Office. The NFL announced Tuesday the Bears’ Week 8 road matchup against the Commanders has been flexed to 3:25 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: South Carolina ranked No. 1 in women's AP Top 25 preseason poll with UConn, USC, Texas and UCLA next
item.description: South Carolina is starting the season where it finished off last year — ranked No. 1 in the AP Top 25 women's college basketball poll. The Gamecocks received 27 of the 30 first-place votes in the preseason rankings from a national media panel Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium in 2028
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta in 2028 at the home of the Falcons, following a vote of approval by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: That's flippin' amazing! Figure skating Grand Prix season begins with backflips no longer banned
item.description: American figure skater Ilia Malinin has been doing gymnastics off the ice much of his life, one of the many reasons why he can so effortlessly land the dazzling quadruple jumps that made him a world champion at just 19 years old last March.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets acquire Raiders wide receiver Davante Adams, AP sources say
item.description: The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jets acquire wide receiver Davante Adams from Raiders, AP sources say
item.description: The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jets acquire wide receiver Davante Adams from Raiders, sources say
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) -- The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: BYU hopes to finish strong after 6-0 start
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - From being picked 13th in the Big 12 Conference, to be ranked 13th in the nation, BYU is off to a 6-0 start for just the sixth time in school history without any superstars or sure-fire NFL prospects. In fact, 16 different players have scored touchdowns this year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Clayton Kershaw planning to pitch again next season
item.description: Clayton Kershaw says he plans to return to the Los Angeles Dodgers for his 18th season next year. The three-time NL Cy Young Award winner isn’t pitching in the current playoffs because of a bone spur in his left big toe that sidelined him for the final month of the regular season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Stingrays at Tropicana Field relocated to The Florida Aquarium after hurricane damage
item.description: The stingrays at Tropicana Field have moved to a new home after the stadium sustained significant damage from Hurricane Milton last week.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dodgers' Flaherty shares NLCS Game 1 'moment' with mother
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers' major trade-deadline acquisition from this summer is already worth it. Jack Flaherty was the star of the show in Game 1 of the NLCS between L.A. and the New York Mets, as he pitched an electric seven shutout innings while giving up just two hits in a 9-0 win.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Los Angeles Clippers to make Intuit Dome debut Monday
item.description: For the first time in one quarter of a century, the Los Angeles Clippers will play a home game in their own, exclusive arena on Monday night. That's because the Intuit Dome, the $2 billion Inglewood arena, is now open seven years after it was first announced to be in the works.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Mets' Kodai Senga struggles with control, knocked out in 2nd inning by Dodgers in NLCS opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Kodai Senga knew something was off just before he took the mound in the National League Championship Series opener.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Broncos fall to Chargers 23-16
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The Denver Broncos' three-game winning streak came to an end with a 23-16 loss to the Los Angeles Chargers at Empower Field. The Broncos struggled early, trailing 23-0 before attempting a late comeback that ultimately fell short.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Ruth Chepngetich of Kenya smashes world record by nearly 2 minutes at Chicago Marathon
item.description: Ruth Chepngetich of Kenya smashed the world record by nearly two minutes at the Chicago Marathon on Sunday, winning in 2:09:56.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears dominate Jaguars in London, 35-16, to extend winning streak to 3 games going into bye week
item.description: The Bears capped off their London trip in style Sunday, routing the Jacksonville Jaguars, 35-16, at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium to extend their winning streak to three games and improve to 4-2 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Penn State makes its first west coast Big Ten trip to USC
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK (Nittany Nation) -- It's not your granddaddy's Big Ten anymore and this week's conference lineup is the people's exhibit A. Minnesota heads to UCLA, Ohio State is at Oregon, and Penn State heads to USC. Three games that hardly feel like Big Ten conference play.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Clay, NewsNation

item.title: Lucha Libre on the rise on the West Coast
item.description: It's not an uncommon sight here in the Bay Area: Hispanic heritage on display -- the outfits, the dancing.
item.dc:creator: Jack Molmud, NewsNation

item.title: Be careful when buying Dodgers-Padres NLDS Game 5 tickets online, USAA says
item.description: Friday night will bring the biggest baseball game in Los Angeles in years as the San Diego Padres visit the Dodgers for a winner-take-all Game 5 in the National League Division Series. And the high stakes are bringing high ticket prices.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: BYU looks to pick up where it left off after bye week
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It's not ideal to have a bye week while on a five-game winning streak, but #14 BYU needed the rest after getting off to a 5-0 start.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
